name: Lou Holtz
description: American Jewish vaudeville dialect comedian and singer-actor
abstract: Lou Holtz (April 11, 1893 – September 22, 1980) was an American vaudevillian, comic actor, and theatrical producer.

concerts.label: Benefit: Jewish Community Center of Saranac Lake

about_quotes.speaker: John W. Bubbles
about_quotes.evidence: take a show to England with Lou Holtz, Luther Velez, Buck and Bubbles, Ruth Etting to do the show called 'Transatlantic Rhythm'

about_quotes.speaker: Dorothy Donegan
about_quotes.evidence: I was in the show with him... So I learned about show business from them, the vaudeville stuff.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dorothy Donegan — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Chuck Green
about_quotes.evidence: See, now he was -- there Lou Holtz, he was a host, George Jessel and Lou Holtz, see.
